title: Investigation: Irish Republican Socialist Party (NI)
text:
Subject: Irish Republican Socialist Party (NI)

Investigated for: Failing to keep accounting records that are sufficient to show and explain the Party’s transactions

Decision: One contravention found A £250 Variable Monetary Penalty was imposed, which is due to be paid by on 3 December 2024

Summary of reasons: Sanctions were considered appropriate and proportionate in this case in line with our Enforcement Policy
